reviewPolicy: Every current non-appendix probability, confidence, calibration, or clinical-sensitivity text hit is keyed by slug, JSON path, and SHA-256 of the exact string. Approved entries must be boundary/sample-structure language only; quantitative or calibrated probability results belong in appendix.probabilities/appendix.uncertainty.
